untranslatable_reason: EEDB pattern requires precise geometric measurement of height ratios between two identified bottoms and highest high, which cannot be calculated from single-bar indicators. The pattern demands: (1) identification of two bottom extrema within a lookback window, (2) measurement of the highest high between them, (3) calculation of height/breakout_price ratio, (4) comparison to median threshold from Table 16.6. This multi-bar structural analysis exceeds indicator-based capabilities. Recommended: implement as custom multi-bar pattern detector in strategy code.
